goal_text:
You want to book a 'taxi'. The taxi should 'arrive by 19:15' and should go to 'parkside pools'.
The taxi should depart from 'a and b guest house'.
Make sure you get 'car type' and 'contact number'.

message: You want to book a taxi. The taxi should arrive by 19:15 and should go to parkside pools
The taxi should depart from a and b guest house
Make sure you get car type and contact number
